creator: axl@iafrica.com
text:
The audio/xamp port currently installs an xamp binary with
	balance and volume controls that do nothing. This is because BSD
	audio support seems to have been added to the software as an
	afterthought.

Fix: The following patch replaces some stupid ifdefs with ones that
	actually get the mixer code included. :)
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install the port and run it. Notice that sliding the volume and
	or balance controls achieves nothing.
